User.title: User
User.description: User profile with roles and custom metadata

id.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user

name.description: Display name of the student or administrator

avatarColor.description: Tailwind color class for avatar background

Content.title: Content
Content.description: Curated mindfulness and academic pressure resources managed by Admin

id.description: The unique document ID of the resource

title.description: Title of the mental health capsule or article

type.description: Type of the resource (e.g., Mẹo vặt, Thực hành, Đọc thêm)

text.description: Core body text of the resource or exercise description

category.description: Mental health concern category (burnout, overthinking, urgency, coping)

/users/{userId}.description: Information stored for authenticated students and administrators

/contents/{contentId}.description: Curated resources for university student challenges and mindfulness
